name: KIORA PHARMACEUTICALS INC
business: We are a clinical-stage specialty pharmaceutical company developing and commercializing therapies for the treatment of retinal diseases. We are developing KIO-301, with an initial focus on patients with later stages of vision loss due to retinitis pigmentosa. We are also developing KIO-104 for the treatment of retinal inflammatory diseases, including Diabetic Macular Edema and Posterior Non-Infectious Uveitis.
sellsTo: patients with ocular presentation of rheumatoid arthritis and other autoimmune diseases

exposures.sentence: We are developing KIO-301, with an initial focus on patients with later stages of vision loss due to retinitis pigmentosa (collectively including any and all sub-forms, "RP").
We are also developing KIO-104 for the treatment of retinal inflammatory diseases, including Diabetic Macular Edema (DME) and Posterior Non-Infectious Uveitis.

catalysts.event: Enrollment ongoing in ABACUS-2 Phase 2 trial for KIO-301 in retinitis pigmentosa
catalysts.sentence: Enrollment in the ABACUS-2 trial is currently ongoing.

catalysts.event: Begun enrollment of KLARITY Phase 2 trial for KIO-104 in retinal inflammation
catalysts.sentence: We began enrollment of the KLARITY trial in the second quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Dosing began in KLARITY Phase 2 trial for KIO-104
catalysts.sentence: Dosing began in the third quarter of 2025.

tamClaims.claim: More than 3.4 million patients globally are estimated to have an inherited retinal disease leading to significant or permanent vision loss.
tamClaims.sentence: More than 3.4 million patients globally are estimated to have an inherited retinal disease leading to significant or permanent vision loss.

tamClaims.claim: With a population of about 348.6 million in the U.S. as of March 2026, about 99,593 people in the U.S. would be expected to have RP.
tamClaims.sentence: Thus, with a population of about 348.6 million in the U.S. as of March 2026, about 99,593 people in 4 Table of Contents the U.S. would be expected to have RP.

tamClaims.claim: With a worldwide population presently estimated at over 8.2 billion, it can be estimated that approximately 2.4 million people around the world have RP.
tamClaims.sentence: With a worldwide population presently estimated at over 8.2 billion, it can be estimated that approximately 2.4 million people around the world have RP.

tamClaims.claim: It is estimated that 34.2 million Americans have diabetes and that approximately 750,000 Americans have DME.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that 34.2 million Americans have diabetes and that approximately 750,000 Americans have DME.

tamClaims.claim: There are approximately 0.2 million cases of posterior non-infectious uveitis annually in the U.S., UK and EU.
tamClaims.sentence: There are approximately 0.2 million cases of posterior non-infectious uveitis annually in the U.S., UK and EU.
